other_observers: Larry Semo and Bill Schmoker; Larry Semo and Bill Schmoker on that date.
specific_location: Box Springs pond on the southeast intersection of Hwy 71 and BB Road.
description: A dark ibis with a thin, bluish-white border to the bill that extended to the eyes but not beyond them, dark bluish-gray facial skin between the eye and bill, brownish bill, dark eye, and dark legs except for the faint reddish ankles ("knees").Behaviors: Mostly foraging on the edge of the pond.Call: none heard.Plumage: adult alternate
